response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Engineer with a strong polyglot background, proven experience in high-throughput distributed systems (handling millions of requests per second), and direct, recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. While he lacks explicit Python experience—a must-have for the role—his deep expertise in TypeScript, system architecture, and modern agentic workflows makes him an exceptionally strong candidate who perfectly aligns with the required AI engineering mindset.
strengths: Direct, hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and supporting agentic workflows.
Proven track record designing high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated Staff-level technical leadership, ownership (as a founder), and commitment to software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD).
concerns: Lacks explicit professional experience with Python, which is listed as a must-have technical skill for this role.
Resume emphasizes Node.js and DLang heavily, which may require a ramp-up period for a Python-centric backend.
Limited explicit mention of operational readiness or out-of-hours on-call incident response, though implied by his seniority.
